Manufactured by [[Sienar Fleet Systems/Legends|Sienar Fleet Systems]],<ref name="DB" /> '''Obsidian 1''' was the lead [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE/ln starfighter]] of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire's]] [[Obsidian Squadron/Legends|Obsidian Squadron]]. [[Pilot/Legends|Piloted]] by [[Civé Rashon/Legends|Civé Rashon]], who operated under the [[Callsign/Legends|call sign]] "Howlrunner" and the designation OS-72-1, Obsidian 1 at one point flew over [[Cloud City/Legends|Cloud City]]<ref name="CCG1" /> on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Bespin/Legends|Bespin]].<ref name="ESB">{{Film|V}}</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
Obsidian 1 originated as a [[TIE series/Legends|TIE/LN]] [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] prop for the [[1980]] [[original trilogy]] film [[Star Wars: Episode V The Empire Strikes Back|''Star Wars'': Episode V ''The Empire Strikes Back'']].<ref name="SWC">''[[Star Wars Chronicles]]''</ref> The starfighter was later brought into [[Star Wars Legends|''Star Wars'' Legends]] [[canon]] by a card in the [[1998]] ''[[Special Edition Limited]]'' expansion set of [[Decipher]]'s [[Star Wars Customizable Card Game|''Star Wars'' Customizable Card Game]].<ref name="CCG1" />
